diagrams.title: List Access Methods in R
diagrams.description: Shows three ways to access list elements: using [[]] for direct element, using [] for sub-list, and using $ for named elements
elements: my_list[1] - Returns sub-list containing first element
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the difference between single and double bracket access is crucial for working with lists in R

diagrams.title: List Structure Comparison
diagrams.description: Compares list structure with vectors and data frames showing types they can contain
elements: Data Frame: Specialized list with equal-length columns
Nested List: Contains lists within lists
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why lists are more flexible than vectors and how data frames relate to lists
